prompt: Arduino-based smart dustbin that uses an ultrasonic sensor to detect nearby objects and automatically opens and closes the lid using a servo motor.
IoT-based automatic plant watering system that monitors soil moisture levels and controls a water pump remotely using the Blynk cloud platform, with real-time visual feedback via an LED matrix.
Arduino-based line follower robot that uses infrared sensors to detect a path and control DC motors for autonomous navigation.
ESP8266-based system that sends SMS notifications with GPS tracker identification and parameter values using the CircuitDigest Cloud API.
ESP32-S3–based digital Ludo board that implements a complete multiplayer game using a touch-sensitive matrix, RGB LEDs, and a round TFT display with animated graphics.
Bluetooth Low Energy–based electronic dice that detects motion and orientation using an accelerometer and wirelessly transmits the rolled face value.
Arduino-based remote-controlled boat that uses 433 MHz RF transmitter and receiver modules to wirelessly control the boat’s motors for forward, backward, left, and right movement
Bluetooth-controlled pick-and-place robotic arm mounted on a mobile car platform that uses an Arduino to drive servos and DC motors for movement and manipulation.
Serial-controlled rover that uses character commands to control the direction of DC motors through a motor driver.
Bluetooth-controlled robotic rover that uses a mobile app to control movement speed, direction, and NeoPixel LED indicators via serial commands.

An IIoT test bed built on the Sipeed Maixduino that monitors light intensity, temperature, humidity, DC motor speed, current, and power consumption, displaying the data on a TFT screen and sending it over serial communication.

A vision-based Bluetooth human–computer interaction system where an Arduino with hall sensors and Bluetooth communicates with a Processing application to track hand movement via a camera, enabling virtual painting and LED control through gestures and magnetic switches.
Snake game implemented on an LED matrix with button controls and score display on an LCD.
Touchscreen-based calculator implemented on Arduino with a TFT LCD, allowing numeric and arithmetic input via on-screen buttons.
A compact Arduino-based spy voice recorder that captures audio from a microphone and saves it as WAV files on an SD card.
An Arduino-based automatic AC temperature controller that monitors room temperature and humidity and controls an air conditioner via IR signals while displaying data on an OLED.
Wireless doorbell that triggers a melody on the receiver when the transmitter button is pressed.
A password typer project that uses a Digispark/ATtiny85 to act as a USB keyboard and automatically type predefined passwords or login details on a computer when a button is pressed.
Arduino piano that plays, records, and replays musical notes with timing.
A digital firecracker that detects heat via a thermistor and triggers sound effects and LED animations using an MP3 module and NeoPixels
Autonomous Fire-Fighting Robot
Arduino-based stepper motor control using a TMC2208 driver for silent and smooth bidirectional rotation.
ESP32-CAM performs real-time face/object recognition and displays detected identities with confidence on an OLED screen.
Bidirectional speed and direction control of a DC motor using the MX1508 motor driver and Arduino via PWM.
Controls a stepper motor’s direction and movement by generating STEP and DIR pulses from Arduino using a stepper motor driver.
Measures ambient sound level by calculating peak-to-peak audio amplitude from an analog microphone signal.
Hand-gesture recognition system that detects swipe, wave, and rotation gestures using a PAJ7620U2 sensor and displays results on an I2C LCD.
Arduino-based water level indicator that senses water depth and drives LEDs to show level intensity or stages.
IoT-enabled people counter that automatically opens entry/exit gates, counts people, and displays live occupancy on an LED matrix and cloud.
Arduino project that reads a capacitive contactless liquid level sensor and reports whether liquid is present without the sensor touching the liquid.
